mapper.select: SELECT id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, session_id, artifact_type, title, content, storage_uri, version_no, created_by, created_at FROM artifact WHERE work_item_id = #{workItemId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, session_id, artifact_type, title, content, storage_uri, version_no, created_by, created_at FROM artifact WHERE workflow_node_instance_id = #{nodeInstanceId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO artifact (id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, session_id, artifact_type, title, content, storage_uri, version_no, created_by) VALUES (#{id}, #{workItemId}, #{workflowInstanceId}, #{workflowNodeInstanceId}, #{sessionId}, #{artifactType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{storageUri}, #{versionNo}, #{createdBy})
